title: SchemaRegistryMeta
description: Meta-schema for registry/schema-registry.json. Enumerates all published JSON Schemas and their $id→path mappings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI — should reference this meta-schema.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this registry was last generated.

version.description: Package version this registry was generated from.

entries.description: List of published JSON Schema entries.

id.description: The $id URI of the JSON Schema.

path.description: Relative path from the package root to the schema file.

latestVersion.description: Latest published version of this schema.

status.description: Publication status of this schema version.
